name: superai-wealth-manager-tools
description: Portfolio analysis, client situation modeling, and market intelligence tools for wealth managers and financial advisors.

tools.name: analyze_portfolio_allocation
tools.description: Analyze a client's portfolio allocation: asset class breakdown, concentration risks, rebalancing opportunities, and alignment with risk tolerance.

tools.name: model_client_situation
tools.description: Build a structured client situation model: goals, timeline, risk capacity, tax situation, and recommended strategy framework.

tools.name: market_intelligence_brief
tools.description: Generate a market intelligence brief covering current macro conditions, sector performance, and key considerations for client conversations.

tools.name: estate_planning_checklist
tools.description: Generate a personalized estate planning checklist based on client situation: family structure, asset complexity, and planning gaps.
